20'-30' untended apple tree, old, unhealthy, unpruned; lots of fruit in 2012, none of it especially good. Tree is on private property, but the current owners of this run-down industrial building are absentee. Access: Private.

Large apple tree, dark red fruits, good yield in fall 2013, froze before I could try them though, unknown quality. Located on what is legally a public right of way, but it has morphed into someone's front yard due to Pittsburgh's lasseiz-faire method of abando

Very old apple tree, in bad shape. House is going to be demolished soon (2014-2015) and the tree wil probably go with it. Tasty red-gold apples. Pear tree overhanging sidewalk on same property. Access: Private. Falling Fruit season: August-November.

Two apple trees and a peach, possibly more fruits that I didn't see. The apples are on private property beyond a gate. The peach leans over the alley. Access: Private. Falling Fruit season: August-November.
Decent looking yield, overhanging the fence. You may need some way to reach to harvest most of the fruit. Still kinda sour on 8/27- might wait until mid September. Access: Public.
